title: Hisaab Barabar
overview: Radhe Mohan, an honest TC working for Indian Railways and a self-proclaimed accounts expert, sets out to uncover a massive financial fraud by banker Mickey Mehta. As Mickey puts the entire system against Radhe, what lies next for him?

trailers.title: Hisaab Barabar | Trailer | R Madhavan | Neil Nitin Mukesh | Ashwni Dhir | Premieres 24th Jan On ZEE5
